title: agentknowledge/v1 frontmatter (AIP-10)
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter portion of an AIP-10 entry, source, or workspace manifest. The doctype is selected via the `schema` discriminator: 'knowledge.entry/v1' (curated, mutable), 'knowledge.source/v1' (raw, immutable), or 'knowledge.workspace/v1' (workspace manifest or per-context view).

schema.description: Discriminator for curated wiki entries. Mutable doctype.

slug.description: Stable kebab-case identifier. Used as the wikilink target ([[slug]]) and as the entry's path stem.

kind.description: Entry kind. The wiki's KNOWLEDGE.md (entityTypes) and AGENTS.md schema together define the allowed values; common ones are 'entity', 'concept', 'summary', 'comparison', 'timeline'.

items.description: Source id (NOT path). The host resolves ids against the source registry.

sources.description: Provenance — list of source ids that back the claims in this entry's body.

confidence.description: Curation agent's confidence in the entry's claims. Advisory; downstream consumers may weight it against source authority and recency.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last patch to this entry. MUST be set on every write.

supersedes.description: Slugs of earlier entries that this one replaces. Resolution rules live in the wiki's KNOWLEDGE.md curation.conflictResolution policy.

contradicts.description: Slugs of entries whose claims conflict with this one and that the contradiction policy could not auto-resolve. Surfaces in lint.

links.description: OPTIONAL hint to the link resolver — slugs this entry links to. The resolver also walks the body for [[slug]] and markdown links; this field is for entries whose links are computed.

tags.description: Free-form tags; consumed by retrieval, search, and grouping in _index.md.

metadata.description: Vendor-specific extensions. Hosts MUST tolerate unknown keys; the spec's normative fields MUST NOT change meaning.

schema.description: Discriminator for raw sources. Immutable doctype — once registered, the host MUST refuse mutations to the file's bytes.

id.description: Stable kebab-case source id, ISO-prefixed when possible (e.g. '2026-04-27-investor-call'). Entries reference sources by id, never by path.

path.description: Path to the raw bytes, relative to the wiki root. MUST start with 'sources/'. The host pins this file once defineSource succeeds.

captured_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the source entered the wiki.

captured_by.description: OPTIONAL — author or operator who pinned the source. May be a user identifier, an agent id, or an upstream system name.

content_hash.description: Cryptographic hash of the file bytes. sha256 is required by the spec; other algorithms MAY appear in additional sidecar fields. Once set, the file is pinned.

authority.description: Source authority class. 'primary' = first-party document or recording; 'secondary' = derived analysis; 'rumour' = unverified claim. Consumed by contradiction policy.

language.description: OPTIONAL — BCP-47 language code of the source. Useful for ingest pipelines that pick a translator.

superseded_by.description: OPTIONAL — id of a newer source that replaces this one. The host writes this; agents do not edit the source file's bytes to 'correct' it. Tombstones the source for contradiction-policy purposes while preserving the original bytes.

metadata.description: Vendor-specific extensions. Hosts MUST tolerate unknown keys.

workspace.description: Workspace manifest doctype. Used both as the root manifest of a wiki (no `extends`) and as a per-consumer view (with `extends`). The same schema validates both modes; the host distinguishes by checking whether `extends` is set.

schema.description: Discriminator for the workspace manifest doctype.

name.description: Stable kebab-case identifier for the workspace or view.

description.description: One-paragraph statement of purpose: what this workspace (or view) is for and who uses it.

version.description: Semantic version of the WORKSPACE shape. Bump on entityTypes / lints / source / curation changes. Independent of the wiki's content version.

extends.description: OPTIONAL — relative path to a parent KNOWLEDGE.md. Presence of this field makes the manifest a VIEW; absence makes it a WORKSPACE ROOT. Recursive composition: parents may themselves declare `extends`. Maximum chain depth is 8.

items.description: Either a ws:// ref to an AIP-9 operator / AIP-6 company / AIP-3 skill, or a relative path to a consumer workspace folder.

appliesTo.description: OPTIONAL — list of consumers this VIEW adapts the workspace for. Hosts MUST refuse the view if any binding does not resolve. Not inherited; views declare their own scope.

curator.description: OPTIONAL — AIP-9 operator that curates this workspace. The host activates this operator for ingest, curation, and lint passes.

governance.description: OPTIONAL — AIP-7 policy or audit binding. May be a path to an AIP-7 policy file or a ws:// ref. Schema-poisoning mitigations and source-mutation audits flow through this ref.

name.description: PascalCase type name. Merge key when composing with extends parent.

fields.description: Canonical fields for this entity type. Child views append fields to parent's set.

icon.description: OPTIONAL — display hint, typically a single emoji.

description.description: OPTIONAL — prose describing what entries of this type capture.

parent.description: OPTIONAL — name of another LOCAL entity type that this one extends. Used for subtyping (e.g. Investor extends Person).

entityTypes.description: Entity types this workspace recognizes. Merge-by-name against the extends parent: a child entry with the same name replaces the parent's; new names are appended.

id.description: Stable kebab-case lint id. Merge key when composing with extends parent.

kind.description: Lint algorithm. 'custom' delegates to a host-defined check identified by `id`.

appliesTo.description: Entity type name (e.g. 'Concept') or '*' for all entries.

severity.description: Lint severity. Child views may soften (warn -> info) but governance policies may forbid that.

params.description: Kind-specific parameters. e.g. { days: 90 } for 'max-age'; { min: 0.6 } for 'min-confidence'.

lints.description: Lint rules. Merge-by-id against the extends parent: a child entry with the same id replaces the parent's; new ids are appended.

signing.description: Whether sources must carry an AIP-7 signature. Composes with AIP-7 governance.

hashAlgo.description: Default content-hash algorithm for new sources.

authorityDefault.description: Default authority assigned to new sources when defineSource omits the field.

sources.description: Source registry policy. Each leaf field overrides independently across the extends chain.

tone.description: Free-form tone hint for the curator agent (e.g. 'academic', 'sales', 'neutral').

depth.description: How exhaustive the curator agent should be when distilling sources into entries.

autoLink.description: Auto-linking policy: 'byName' walks bodies for entity names and inserts wikilinks; 'manual' leaves links to the agent; 'off' disables auto-linking entirely.

conflictResolution.description: How the curator agent resolves contradictions when sources disagree.

newEntryThreshold.description: Prose hint for when to promote a mention into a full entry (vs leaving it as a body reference).

curation.description: Curation policy. Each leaf field overrides independently across the extends chain.

preferRecent.description: When ranking results, weight recency higher.

preferAuthoritative.description: When ranking results, weight authority='primary' higher.

scopeTo.description: Default query scope — entity types this view focuses on. Replaced wholesale by child if present.

queryHints.description: Hints for how consumers should retrieve from this view.

homePage.description: OPTIONAL — slug of the entry to use as the workspace landing page.

display.description: Display hints for UIs that render the workspace. Runtime-agnostic.

metadata.description: Vendor-specific extensions, namespaced under <vendor>. Deep-merged across the extends chain.

allOf.description: A view (any manifest with appliesTo set) MUST extend a parent. A workspace-root manifest has neither field.
